overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk city. The player explores a semi-covered urban plaza featuring graffiti-covered walls, industrial piping, scattered debris, and deceased NPCs, eventually approaching a street vendor stall. The environment features overcast lighting and modern megastructures.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront walkway with industrial piping

agents.ego_description: walking along a red paved path beside a large rock formation, approaching a burning barrel

entered.detail: dirty mattress discarded on the ground near garbage bags
cluster of black trash bags piled on the pathway
massive natural rock outcrop integrated into the urban environment
metal barrel with open flame providing light and smoke
tall modern structure with glass facade and red structural elements
large yellow pipeline running horizontally across the scene

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic urban walkway with a wet red pavement. The player moves past discarded items including a mattress and garbage bags, with a large rock formation on the right and a burning barrel ahead. Industrial yellow pipes and modern buildings dominate the background under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath megastructure with graffiti walls

events.description: moves from open walkway into covered area beneath large overpass structure
lighting shifts from natural overcast to artificial fluorescent strips under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under a massive concrete overpass, passing deceased individuals lying on the ground

entered.detail: dark wall covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art
massive dark concrete megastructure forming a roof over the walkway
thick concrete columns supporting the overhead structure
large industrial waste containers with yellow lids
deceased individuals lying on the pavement in various positions

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. The walls are covered in graffiti, and several deceased individuals lie on the red pavement. Fluorescent light strips illuminate the area as the player moves between support pillars toward a stairway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza with planter trees and scattered debris

events.description: begins ascending stairs to upper plaza level
interaction prompts appear on screen for a terminal device

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs to an upper plaza, navigating around planters and deceased individuals

entered.detail: concrete staircase with red and gray surfaces leading upward
large trees growing in square concrete planters
modern dark metal seating arranged in rows
metal railing along the edge of the upper level
electronic device with holographic display and interaction prompts

segments.scene_description: The player ascends to an upper plaza level featuring trees in concrete planters and modern benches. The area contains more deceased individuals and opens up to show surrounding megastructures. An interactive terminal appears with UI prompts for 'Turn Off' and 'Distract' options.

scene_state.functional_zone: street vendor area with market stall and seating

events.description: approaches living NPCs after passing through area with only dead bodies

agents.ego_description: approaching a street vendor stall where NPCs are seated under an umbrella

notable_agents.action: vendor sitting under white umbrella at food stall with red equipment

entered.detail: street food setup with white umbrella, red containers, and cardboard boxes
stacked shipping boxes and containers near the vendor
low dark wooden railing along the grass edge
bright yellow automated kiosk or machine

segments.scene_description: The player moves toward a street vendor stall in an open plaza area. After passing through zones with only deceased individuals, living NPCs are now visible sitting under a white umbrella at the food stall. Cardboard boxes and a yellow vending machine are visible nearby, with a wooden fence lining the grassy area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a gritty cyberpunk district that transitions from a desolate industrial walkway into a populated urban plaza. It begins on wet red pavement strewn with garbage and a burning barrel, moving past yellow industrial pipes under a heavy overcast sky. As the camera enters a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, the environment shifts to a dim, fluorescent-lit corridor lined with graffiti and deceased figures. The scene then ascends a stairway to an upper plaza level where concrete planters and modern benches appear amidst the surrounding megastructures, pausing briefly at an interactive terminal. Finally, the camera moves through the open plaza past more debris and fallen bodies before arriving at a street vendor stall where living NPCs sit beneath a white umbrella.
